reviews.review_title: THIS GAME IS SO BUNS TO INFINITY
reviews.review_description: Bro me and my friend were tryna find a good horror game and these goofy npc reviews were saying the best graphics. Jit the graphics and the player model were soooo bad like your hands are bent 95 degrees💀 and the monster movement is buns.

the monsers are perfect i have never seen a better game I could play this 24/7  its scary and the have the best and i mean bet cosmetics like I would rate 10000000000 out of 5 like i would play it 100000000000000years like its the best game pure perfection the monster are pure perfection and tje jumpsare os better like i would rate this mor than a 5 its better than perfect way better its on a way diffrent lwvel its just the best flipping game and thats the truth

I have been playing this game non stop it is so much fun reasons why you should get 
•good community -everyone was so nice to me
•nice moderators -they where so nice it made me love it more 
•extremely fun - ⚠️YOU WILL GET ADDICTED ⚠️
Those are all I love this game if I could rate it higher than 5/5 if I could I would do 1000000000000000000/5 NOT KIDDING 
Love the game so much fun I forgot to do my homework 
W game w mods and w community

Game is fire and reminds me of monkey mischief a lil bit and another game playing the game reminded me of running from the Monsters in Monkey Mischief and everything about it just gives me Monkey Mischief Vibes Everyone reading this you gotta try this Fire game🔥🔥
I hope everyone is going to play it
